revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-250

Alternative term: Bearing resolution

The ability of a radar to distinguish between two targets solely by the measurement of angles. It is generally expressed in terms of the minimum angle by which targets must be spaced to be separately distinguishable.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Angular resolution}}
